twitter.content:
The Senate returns from vacation on July 13th.

The Senate goes on vacation — again — beginning August 8th.

If we don’t pass the SAVE America Act by August 7th, it likely won’t happen.

You should be calling & emailing your Senators every single day.

Call local state offices.

posts.author: ImprerialWalker
posts.title: India now dominates global research paper retractions with 6 universities in top 10

link_metadata.description: India’s rise in global research rankings is now shadowed by a sharp spike in paper retractions. With six Indian universities among the world’s top 10 for retractions, concerns around plagiarism, fake peer reviews, and flawed incentives are growing, raising questions about credibility, funding, and the future of Indian science.
link_metadata.title: India now dominates global research paper retractions with 6 universities in top 10
